entity.summary: Historical ve(3,3)-style decentralized exchange and liquidity marketplace for Base and Unichain whose website is now down and whose protocol registry flags a rug pull involving user funds.
entity.notes: DefiLlama explicitly flags Hydrometer Finance as having rug pulled user funds and states that its website is down, while residual Base liquidity remains visible. HEI uses inactive rather than dead because this review did not recover a reliable dated terminal marker. No death date or shutdown event is inferred.

evidence.title: Hydrometer Finance protocol status and metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile states that Hydrometer Finance rug pulled user funds and that its website is down, while preserving residual Base TVL and the historical DEX identity.

evidence.title: Hydrometer Finance DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Structured DEX registry preserves Hydrometer Finance as a Base decentralized exchange candidate and corroborates the protocol identity.
